sicCodes.title: What will the partnership be doing?
sicCodes.searchPlaceholder: Search by SIC code or description
sicCodes.addTitle: Tell us about the entended nature of business
sicCodes.addHint: Start typing a keyword to see a list of business activities. For example, 'finance'. Or, enter the SIC code if you know it. You can add up to 4 SIC codes.

expander.title: What are SIC codes?
expander.paragraph1: The SIC (Standard Industrial Classification) codes indicate the partnership's nature of business. A partnership can have up to 4 codes.
expander.paragraph2: Search for a business activity using keywords that best describe what the partnership does. If you can't find an exact match, search for other keywords that relate to the partnership's activities.
expander.paragraph3Link: SIC codes list (opens in a new tab)
expander.paragraph3End: may help you find a suitable business activity.
